AMENDMENT NO. 2 TO MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT

between MegaCloud Inc. ("Vendor") and Customer Corp. ("Customer")
Effective Date: January 1, 2025

This Amendment No. 2 (the "Amendment") further amends the Master Services
Agreement effective January 1, 2022, as previously amended by Amendment
No. 1 (together, the "Agreement") between Vendor and Customer.

1. BACKGROUND
1.1 The parties wish to update the per-seat fee, introduce an annual
escalation mechanism, clarify proration for mid-cycle seat changes, and
add a one-time data migration fee in connection with Customer's platform
migration.

2. DEFINITIONS
2.1 Capitalized terms not defined herein have the meaning given in the
Agreement.

3. REVISED PER-SEAT FEE
3.1 Effective January 1, 2025, the per-seat fee set forth in MSA Section
6.2 is amended to $16.50 per active seat per month.

4. ANNUAL ESCALATION; CAP
4.1 Beginning January 1, 2025, fees may increase annually by up to five
percent (5%), provided that cumulative increases under this Section shall
not exceed ten percent (10%) above the rate in effect as of the date of
this Amendment.

5. PRORATION
5.1 Mid-cycle changes in seat count shall be prorated on a daily basis.

6. ONE-TIME MIGRATION FEE
6.1 Customer shall pay a one-time data migration fee of $2,500.00, due
upon the September 2025 migration window.

7. NO OTHER CHANGES
7.1 Except as expressly modified by this Amendment, all other terms of the
Agreement (as previously amended) remain in full force and effect.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Amendment as of the
Effective Date above.
